name: CLX - MGA Insurance Suitability Interview v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Session-token auth (advisor / mga_principal / supervisor / admin). Starts a conversational suitability interview for the INSURANCE vertical. Generates the first question via Claude tuned to product_type, sends it to the lead via specified channel (whatsapp/sms/email/web), creates the suitability_assessments row (vertical_id='insurance'), returns assessment_id for the conversation handler to track.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, lead_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.lead_id, client_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.client_id, content: $('Build Insert').item.json.question }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, lead_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.lead_id, client_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.client_id, content: $('Build Insert').item.json.question }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'lead-meeting-booked', to: $('Build Insert').item.json.lead_email, vars: { first_name: 'there', message: $('Build Insert').item.json.question, landing_url: 'https://app.crystallux.org' } }) }}

={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Assessment').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'suitability_started', client_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.client_id, advisor_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_user_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_role: 'advisor', event_data: { suitability_id: row && row.id, lead_id: $('Build Insert').item.json.lead_id, product_type: row && row.product_type, channel: row && row.channel }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Assessment').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', suitability_id: row && row.id, first_question: $('Build Insert').item.json.question, channel: $('Build Insert').item.json.channel }); })() }}
